REMOVE_CAP_OR_LID_PUMP.description: Twist off a bottle cap, container lid, or pump nozzle.

PEEL_OFF_LABEL_FILM.description: Peel paper labels, shrink films, or plastic windows off packaging.

EMPTY_CONTENTS.description: Pour out liquid or shake out remaining contents.

EMPTY_DRINKS_CONTAINER.description: Finish or pour out drink before recycling the container.

EMPTY_SPRAY_CAN.description: Use up aerosol contents completely; shake to confirm no liquid remains.

RELEASE_GAS.description: Puncture pressurised can outdoors to release residual gas safely.

RINSE_LIGHTLY.description: Quick rinse with tap water to clear residue.

WIPE_FOOD_RESIDUE_BEFORE_RECYCLING.description: Wipe off grease or food residue before recycling.

REMOVE_FOOD_WASTE.description: Scrape out food bits or leftover solids from the container.

REMOVE_TAPE.description: Peel sticky tape, shipping labels, or attached strings off the item.

FLATTEN_BOX.description: Press or stomp cardboard / paper packaging completely flat.

CRUSH.description: Crush a PET or plastic bottle flat to reduce volume.

CRUSH_CANS_BOTTLES.description: Crush metal cans flat to save space in recycling.

BREAK_PIECES.description: Break large or bulky items into smaller pieces (e.g., styrofoam).

TIE_BUNDLE.description: Stack and tie paper or cardboard into a string bundle.

SEPARATE_BY_MATERIAL.description: Disassemble or pull apart mixed-material items into their components.

SEPARATIING_CUP_PARTS.description: Split paper cup parts (lid, sleeve, body) before recycling.

RECYCLE_METALS.description: Pull out and recycle metal components separately.

PUT_IN_GENERAL_BIN.description: Drop into the white 일반쓰레기 bag (Gangnam-gu general waste).

PUT_IN_RECYCLE_PAPER.description: Place into the paper / cardboard recycling collection.

PUT_IN_RECYCLE_PLASTIC_PET.description: Place into the transparent PET or plastic recycling collection.

PUT_IN_RECYCLE_GLASS.description: Carefully place glass bottle into the green glass recycling bin.

PUT_IN_RECYCLE_CANS_METALS.description: Place into the can / metal recycling collection.

PUT_IN_RECYCLE_BATTERIES_BULBS.description: Drop into the dedicated battery or fluorescent-bulb collection box.

DONATION_BIN.description: Place wearable clothing or accessories into the 의류수거함.

FOOD_WASTE_SEPARATE.description: Drop into the yellow food-waste bag or RFID food-waste bin.

CALL_COMMUNITY_CENTER.description: Call 1599-0903 or contact the 주민센터 / district office for pickup or registration.
